ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the web service */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint URL for the web service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the web service (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service configuration */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with this configuration */,
  "actions_mapping" TEXT /* Mapping of WS-Addressing actions to service operations */,
  "operations_mapping" TEXT /* Mapping of operation names to functions */,
  "default_values" TEXT /* Default values for configuration options */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_configurations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with this operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function implementing the operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the operation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ws_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WS-Addressing action */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation associated with this action */,
  "action_uri" TEXT /* URI of the WS-Addressing action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the WS-Addressing action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ws_actions_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration option */,
  "value_domain" TEXT /* Value domain for the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, service_manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_service_configs" (
  "user_service_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-service configuration association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with this configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service configuration associated with this user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_service_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_service_configs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES service_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_service_configs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration change log */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service configuration that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES service_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
